name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: State Representatives Fighting for Your Voice on State Flag
body:
State Representatives Fighting for Your Voice on State Flag
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/SeVhpbKn0uJaiZwEHKNfg9y7DACskVmxJamS_SpBmgMfgNf66zGsk_kXxtZkPSBp6vzkNfc_mxdJJkwZ2ljki7gg83j-wYdvbGmoP9AxWDPXsBREHycdk8y9SvjxAefCFSnPhGJIfPEw6E6LtvuB-795iyACUwjOpDQDYh-JpFGTb7s8XPZR0e1nTSIAF2jxoeBDLkTWQld4xyxqoebPJaRDyTLsNZyj357ofpnZgpsbvASSu9F9I8UfRu6i4e_hSgg)
---
| | | |
---
**State Representatives Fighting for Your Voice on State Flag**
| |
---
| | | |
---
In 2001 the legislature asked the citizens of Mississippi to choose their flag. The overwhelming majority of people choose the 1894 flag. I do not believe the legislature should overrule a vote made by the people. If the people of Mississippi want to change their flag then they should have the opportunity to voice their opinion by voting for or against changing the flag. If it comes to a vote, I will NOT vote to suspend the rules of the House to take up a bill to change the flag. Legislators have asked to take up this issue every year for the past four years that I’ve been in the legislature. Every year we are told that it is not an issue we are going to discuss. Now, during a Pandemic, during a time of civil unrest, and while terrorist groups are destroying cities and monuments our leadership decides we need to rush a vote on the flag. Rushing a vote is poor judgement, every time we rush to make a decision it turns out to be a bad decision. I will fight for your voice and against the back-room deals being made to sway legislators. I will not sell my vote for SEC football tickets or campaign contributions. I believe the people are smarter than the politicians in Jackson, MS.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Elisa=20Cardnell?=
subject: Congressional Candidates Join Moms in Office
body:
Meet the directors who are throwing their vital support behind women running for office. | | | |
---
|
# We are all in this together.
---
| | |
---
| |
> Political Action Committee [Moms In Office](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b04e5318e5&e=3f151f8b74) has been working behind the scenes to encourage more progressive mothers to run for office and change the status quo in the nation’s highest legislature.
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fc1d90e66f&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
### **Hey-**

We are honored to be featured this week by a leading daily women's media site, [Girltalk HQ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=79341c84d0&e=3f151f8b74). We are proud of the diverse and intersectional leadership we have built and we are excited to expand our national coalition of moms in politics across the nation. Read the full interview with our directors [here.](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=ce7017e841&e=3f151f8b74)

We have 5 days to go to meet our fundraising deadline on June 30th. The last few months have been challenging for all of us and we are immensely grateful for the hundreds of donations we have received from our supporters. If you can chip in one more time, every dollar makes a difference. We are fighting for the candidates who will fight for us and all working families in Congress.

We are so close to our goal, but can't do this without you.

Thank you!
Elisa Cardnell, Executive Director
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8279195e7d&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
---
| | Political Action Committee [Moms In Office](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=4e29ba4fc6&e=3f151f8b74) has been working behind the scenes to encourage more progressive mothers to run for office and change the status quo in the nation’s highest legislature. Founded by single mom [Simona Grace](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b9b76d84e2&e=3f151f8b74) (who regularly reminds her followers on social media that to date there is only one single mother of young children in Congress – the badass California Rep Katie Porter), this organization boasts a board of directors that is diverse, passionate, and dedicated to seeing the issues concerning mothers be front and center in our politics.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=77dd0c1319&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=aef038bd38&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=751c7672e2&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](www.momsinoffice.org)
---
|
---

Moms in Office13351 Riverside Dr # 265Sherman Oaks, CA 91423-2542
[Add us to your address book](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74&c=1effdd09df).

Friend,

First, I want to say thank you so much for the Father’s Day card from this grassroots team. I am so grateful to have you on my side both on and off the campaign trail. Now, I want to explain to you what the next few days means for our race, and [**why I need your support now more than ever.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18021032/214414828/-2111600035?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.26_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=73f4773d-b9b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Y0NzczZC1iOWI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcFM_H3BMAr6M2KKWbSiQFEFsum6okX1igvnYI3bKJI=)

**If we can raise $20,000 before our FEC filing deadline, there will be no question that our campaign has what it takes to defeat Scott Perry and flip this seat blue in November.** This deadline represents our first big test of the general election, and I’m counting on you to help us finish strong.

**Special interest groups have already invested over _$1 million_ into keeping PA-10 in Republican hands.** They’ve made it clear that they’re willing to do _whatever it takes_ to prop up Scott Perry and push their far-right agenda. clean_body: I want to explain to you what the next few days means for our race, and why I need your support now more than ever. = We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Friend, First, I want to say thank you so much for the Father’s Day card from this grassroots team. I am so grateful to have you on my side both on and off the campaign trail. Now, I want to explain to you what the next few days means for our race, and = Team, June 30th is our first FEC filing deadline of the general election , and that means our fundraising numbers are about to become public for all to see. Scott Perry and the Washington Republican establishment will be pouring over our report to look for any sign of weakness. If we can raise $20,000 before our FEC filing deadline, there will be no question that our campaign has what it takes to defeat Scott Perry and flip this seat blue in November. This deadline represents our first big test of the general election, and I’m counting on you to help us finish strong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Special interest groups have already invested over $1 million into keeping PA-10 in Republican hands. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: A “personal challenge” for Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there — Donald Trump nearly won Minnesota in 2016 and he has made it a “personal challenge” to win it in 2020. **If Donald Trump is successful, he will most likely secure a second term.** That’s why he will do and spend whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red, which could spell bad news for my friend Tina Smith who is up for re-election this year. Mitch McConnell’s billionaire donor network has already made her a top target, and Donald Trump has hand-picked her GOP opponent. **If we lose Tina, it’s very unlikely Democrats can flip the Senate.** Tina can beat her hand-picked opponent and we can take back the Senate. But we need your help to do it. **If you are able to, will you contribute to Tina Smith’s re-election campaign today? Donald Trump thinks he can win Minnesota. We’re going to prove him wrong. | | |
---
| Derek, have you seen some of the headlines about the Democrat Executive Council in the last few weeks?

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUyMTI1ODA1NzI2NDA2MzcxJmM9ZTF2NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjI5MDQxNTQmZD1uNnY3ejZ0.oIpplalQx65nf5VQT0uNIIcD8ZPDbIIGvl0LxklP5lE)

---
| |
---
| While Andru Volinsky runs for Governor, he's been leading the **Obstructionist Democrats** on the Council for years. Volinsky's "structural political racism" is being enabled by just two individuals: **Mike Cryans** and **Deb Pignatelli.** Neither called out Volinsky when he said Ryan Terrell was a "demeaning" nomination akin to "tokenism." Neither voted for Ryan Terrell, siding with Volinsky that he was "unqualified." Neither broke ranks with Volinsky on the Council to schedule a hearing for Eddie Edwards. And, as of this email, neither have apologize to Ryan Terrell or Eddie Edwards for the "structural political racism" exhibited by the Democrat Executive Council.
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUyMTI1ODA1NzI2NDA2MzcxJmM9ZTF2NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjI5MDQxNjYmZD1sOHIxYTZm.3_GoG0aWr5o0qdoInKZTWDjfiG1rxsexb7TjV9i9tyo)

| |

[Invest in the NHGOP so we can do just that.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUyMTI1ODA1NzI2NDA2MzcxJmM9ZTF2NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjI5MDQxNzQmZD16NHc4ajhz.bTkaemP0ga6kerPoZETphfQHf8loUxpm6K1-4ia1v6g)

name: Margaret Good
subject: Friend, join us June 30th for a special event!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi friend, Five years ago the U.S. Supreme Court made marriage equality a reality for all Americans. It was a victory for the LGBTQ+ community, and a monumental step forward for justice and equality for all. Today, I'm overjoyed to invite you to our June 30th event themed around LGBTQ+ rights. The digital fundraiser will include special appearances from activists in the fight for equality, including Equality Florida Executive Director Nadine Smith, author and communications specialist Elizabeth Hines, and Roberta Kaplan, who represented Edie Windsor in the Supreme Court case that overturned the Defense of Marriage Act.

It was a victory for the LGBTQ+ community and a monumental step forward for justice and equality for all. Today, I'm overjoyed to invite you to our June 30th event themed around LGBTQ+ rights. The digital fundraiser will include special appearances from activists in the fight for equality, including Equality Florida Executive Director Nadine Smith, author and communications specialist Elizabeth Hines, and Roberta Kaplan, who represented Edie Windsor in the Supreme Court case that overturned the Defense of Marriage Act. Thank you to our hosts and special guests for making this such an amazing event and if you haven't already, **[click here to RSVP now and secure your spot!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18024988/214472996/1063299298?attr=113817338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhOTQ1YS1jZGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hewj09G-d0SY3aF2Y0dia6uRwn43q_yJx4VzyUpLYCc=&emci=073768f7-b9b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=1f2a945a-cdb7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18024989/214472997/1063299298?attr=113817338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjJhOTQ1YS1jZGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hewj09G-d0SY3aF2Y0dia6uRwn43q_yJx4VzyUpLYCc=&emci=073768f7-b9b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=1f2a945a-cdb7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Jason Yates
subject: Life-impacting Event for the Next Generations
body:
| | My Faith Votes partners with Summit Ministries
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y7SRzFG9dH_vnqqBc4DKFXBT-yeLpVeRoqZXQvvyVDi-71e-cx2geX7ov_iP8Q0xltnvN8I-YIGeW77Yg4b_axk_DiWJNOhj1mQ7p8VaEdp8UcHLP2fZNq8mx2ZhOVchnruFloi6fb-yG5qKtLQ3g9jFze3Bh_3p_P41azBckNHw-AYF_zK9Djjv87DOPr4FggF2RQGk_M5TyzIHoKNSWt-8Nv025Op-GMpiurjT5WQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200626apl01&n=1)
| Peter, The youngest Americans — millennials and Generation Z — are set to exercise their political muscle in 2020, making up 37% of the electorate. Their worldview will impact how they vote and how our nation moves forward. If you’re looking for a way to encourage young adults to be prepared to stand for faith in our culture, consider [Summit Virtual](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y7SRzFG9dH_vnqqBc4DKFXBT-yeLpVeRoqZXQvvyVDi-71e-cx2geX7ov_iP8Q0xltnvN8I-YIGeW77Yg4b_axk_DiWJNOhj1mQ7p8VaEdp8UcHLP2fZNq8mx2ZhOVchnruFloi6fb-yG5qKtLQ3g9jFze3Bh_3p_P41azBckNHw-AYF_zK9Djjv87DOPr4FggF2RQGk_M5TyzIHoKNSWt-8Nv025Op-GMpiurjT5WQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200626apl01&n=2). **Summit Virtual is a live, interactive, on-line program developed by our friends, and new My Faith Votes partner, Summit Ministries. This five-day, online program equips young adults ages 16-to-25 to embrace God’s truth and champion a biblical worldview.** If you are between the ages of 16-to-25 years old, [please consider applying](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y7SRzFG9dH_vnqqBc4DKFXBT-yeLpVeRoqZXQvvyVDi-71e-cx2geX7ov_iP8Q0xltnvN8I-YIGeW77Yg4b_axk_DiWJNOhj1mQ7p8VaEdp8UcHLP2fZNq8mx2ZhOVchnruFloi6fb-yG5qKtLQ3g9jFze3Bh_3p_P41azBckNHw-AYF_zK9Djjv87DOPr4FggF2RQGk_M5TyzIHoKNSWt-8Nv025Op-GMpiurjT5WQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200626apl01&n=3). If you’re not in this age group, but you have a child, grandchild, or friend who is, encourage them to attend. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y7SRzFG9dH_vnqqBc4DKFXBT-yeLpVeRoqZXQvvyVDi-71e-cx2geX7ov_iP8Q0xltnvN8I-YIGeW77Yg4b_axk_DiWJNOhj1mQ7p8VaEdp8UcHLP2fZNq8mx2ZhOVchnruFloi6fb-yG5qKtLQ3g9jFze3Bh_3p_P41azBckNHw-AYF_zK9Djjv87DOPr4FggF2RQGk_M5TyzIHoKNSWt-8Nv025Op-GMpiurjT5WQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200626apl01&n=4) **The culture wants to shame young Christian adults into silence. Summit Virtual helps ensure that doesn’t happen by preparing the next generation to be bold biblical leaders.** Young adults will hear from top Christian apologists and best-selling authors who will help guide them step-by-step on how to courageously answer challenges to their faith. **_Here are five reasons it might Summit Virtual might be for you:_**
1. **Get answers.** You’ll join young adults from all over the world in learning to stand for God and the Bible so you can answer Christianity’s harshest critics and toughest questions.
2. **Change pace.** Summit Virtual will be live and interactive. Get answers to your questions and develop your leadership through fascinating talks, Q & A sessions, and discussion groups.
3. **Earn college credit.** Students who attend Summit Virtual can earn up to three college credits.
4. **Receive scholarships.** Students who complete the Summit Virtual 5-day conference will be eligible to receive college scholarships to schools across the U.S.
5. **Caring mentors.** Summit Virtual features 24-hour access to mentors with any questions you have about your faith.

Culture draws a line in the sand. Summit Virtual invites young Christians to boldly step across the line to live a life of purpose and meaning. This program can have a lifelong impact on every young person who attends. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y7SRzFG9dH_vnqqBc4DKFXBT-yeLpVeRoqZXQvvyVDi-71e-cx2geX7ov_iP8Q0xltnvN8I-YIGeW77Yg4b_axk_DiWJNOhj1mQ7p8VaEdp8UcHLP2fZNq8mx2ZhOVchnruFloi6fb-yG5qKtLQ3g9jFze3Bh_3p_P41azBckNHw-AYF_zK9Djjv87DOPr4FggF2RQGk_M5TyzIHoKNSWt-8Nv025Op-GMpiurjT5WQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200626apl01&n=5) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200626apl01&n=6)
---
* * *

clean_body: | | My Faith Votes partners with Summit Ministries | Peter, The youngest Americans — millennials and Generation Z — are set to exercise their political muscle in 2020, making up 37% of the electorate. Their worldview will impact how they vote and how our nation moves forward. If you’re looking for a way to encourage young adults to be prepared to stand for faith in our culture, consider . Summit Virtual is a live, interactive, on-line program developed by our friends, and new My Faith Votes partner, Summit Ministries. This five-day, online program equips young adults ages 16-to-25 to embrace God’s truth and champion a biblical worldview. If you are between the ages of 16-to-25 years old, . If you’re not in this age group, but you have a child, grandchild, or friend who is, encourage them to attend. The culture wants to shame young Christian adults into silence. Summit Virtual helps ensure that doesn’t happen by preparing the next generation to be bold biblical leaders. Young adults will hear from top Christian apologists and best-selling authors who will help guide them step-by-step on how to courageously answer challenges to their faith. Here are five reasons it might Summit Virtual might be for you: 1. Get answers. You’ll join young adults from all over the world in learning to stand for God and the Bible so you can answer Christianity’s harshest critics and toughest questions. 2. Change pace. Summit Virtual will be live and interactive. Get answers to your questions and develop your leadership through fascinating talks, Q & A sessions, and discussion groups. 3. Earn college credit. Students who attend Summit Virtual can earn up to three college credits. 4. Receive scholarships. Students who complete the Summit Virtual 5-day conference will be eligible to receive college scholarships to schools across the U.S. 5. Caring mentors. Summit Virtual features 24-hour access to mentors with any questions you have about your faith. Culture draws a line in the sand. Summit Virtual invites young Christians to boldly step across the line to live a life of purpose and meaning. This program can have a lifelong impact on every young person who attends. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: President Trump Needs Us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUoDToqB6V16M1KYl_GW4vrjkSAMUlUcu_GJVj0j4xw-95d0kFeytzcIWdpHwjJALifQVabqPECbLiJ3LrCNuxi12aEmhn-CLuOgXguoNvhuHShZdEWUlf2x7YMktdqdawkMARBDHy14_zyne5x5WyVyWy-_mkm4Yj-k7bFUOPjp9lBz4Cst4g==&c=ar0CC8aL71qjhqc7UnkyUiM-pReCfa7hWq9TG_YxL289uIlSqfTK-g==&ch=yjY2sfkq9AahF9_YsxTGiyXv9uPJLMF4xrEA7miCw40Aj57Y5rjJig==)
---
| Patriot,
As President Trump's number one defender, I see the barrage of attacks and hatred directed at him on a daily basis.
From the moment he declared himself as a candidate, President Trump has been smeared by the media, mocked by Hollywood elite, disparaged by "establishment" Republicans, and was impeached by the radical Democrats in the House.
Despite all this, President Trump has done amazing things for our country, and I'm proud to call him a friend. Because of the constant attacks he has to endure, the President needs Patriots like us to show our support!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUoDToqB6V16M1KYl_GW4vrjkSAMUlUcu_GJVj0j4xw-95d0kFeytzcIWdpHwjJALifQVabqPECbLiJ3LrCNuxi12aEmhn-CLuOgXguoNvhuHShZdEWUlf2x7YMktdqdawkMARBDHy14_zyne5x5WyVyWy-_mkm4Yj-k7bFUOPjp9lBz4Cst4g==&c=ar0CC8aL71qjhqc7UnkyUiM-pReCfa7hWq9TG_YxL289uIlSqfTK-g==&ch=yjY2sfkq9AahF9_YsxTGiyXv9uPJLMF4xrEA7miCw40Aj57Y5rjJig==)

| | | [PRESIDENT TRUMP NEEDS OUR SUPPORT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUoDToqB6V16M1KYl_GW4vrjkSAMUlUcu_GJVj0j4xw-95d0kFeytzcIWdpHwjJALifQVabqPECbLiJ3LrCNuxi12aEmhn-CLuOgXguoNvhuHShZdEWUlf2x7YMktdqdawkMARBDHy14_zyne5x5WyVyWy-_mkm4Yj-k7bFUOPjp9lBz4Cst4g==&c=ar0CC8aL71qjhqc7UnkyUiM-pReCfa7hWq9TG_YxL289uIlSqfTK-g==&ch=yjY2sfkq9AahF9_YsxTGiyXv9uPJLMF4xrEA7miCw40Aj57Y5rjJig==)
---
| I will never stop defending President Trump, and because of this, I am also facing constant attacks and harassment from the DC Swamp, not to mention the radical Democrats in Congress and the mainstream media. [I NEED YOU ON MY TEAM](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUoDToqB6V16M1KYl_GW4vrjkSAMUlUcu_GJVj0j4xw-95d0kFeytzcIWdpHwjJALifQVabqPECbLiJ3LrCNuxi12aEmhn-CLuOgXguoNvhuHShZdEWUlf2x7YMktdqdawkMARBDHy14_zyne5x5WyVyWy-_mkm4Yj-k7bFUOPjp9lBz4Cst4g==&c=ar0CC8aL71qjhqc7UnkyUiM-pReCfa7hWq9TG_YxL289uIlSqfTK-g==&ch=yjY2sfkq9AahF9_YsxTGiyXv9uPJLMF4xrEA7miCw40Aj57Y5rjJig==) so that I can keep supporting the President and America-First policies!
---
| | | [DEFEND THE PRESIDENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUoDToqB6V16M1KYl_GW4vrjkSAMUlUcu_GJVj0j4xw-95d0kFeytzcIWdpHwjJALifQVabqPECbLiJ3LrCNuxi12aEmhn-CLuOgXguoNvhuHShZdEWUlf2x7YMktdqdawkMARBDHy14_zyne5x5WyVyWy-_mkm4Yj-k7bFUOPjp9lBz4Cst4g==&c=ar0CC8aL71qjhqc7UnkyUiM-pReCfa7hWq9TG_YxL289uIlSqfTK-g==&ch=yjY2sfkq9AahF9_YsxTGiyXv9uPJLMF4xrEA7miCw40Aj57Y5rjJig==)

| God bless America,
---
|

Matt Gaetz

name: Team Sri
subject: we're announcing our end-of-quarter goal amount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

$7,240.

That’s how much more our finance team has calculated that we need to bring in online before the end of this quarter -- and before we report our total numbers to the FEC.
Friend , $7,240 is exactly what we need to put our campaign on the right track through Election Day and on to victory.
But first, we need you to help raise our momentum and close this gap. Can we count on you to be one of our first donors toward our $7,240 goal?

Donate >> http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.26_ts_all&amount=25

Sri is the only candidate offering to bring common-sense solutions and a values-based vision to Congress on behalf of Texas families. His campaign is laser-focused on the issues facing our district, from the rising costs of prescription drugs to the inequities we face in our recovering economy.

Meanwhile, our Republican opponents are in a race to be as far to the right as possible -- and because of that, outside interests are pouring money into their runoff because they know Sri’s campaign threatens their interests.

We don’t need outside corporate interests dictating the outcome of this race and buying influence. We don’t need to have the campaign we’re building resort to cheap media takes and extremist rhetoric.

We need a representative that will stand up for all of us.

Sri will be that representative -- and if you agree, we need you to chip in to our goal so we can prove we have what it takes to win.

Chip in now ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.26_ts_all&amount=25

Let's get this done,
--Team Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.26_ts_b1_all&amount=25]
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/73cf1907-c9b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/e8f5d7dc-d3b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGY1ZDdkYy1kM2I3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLb1mQkJrmIE39WK69y9AbSjvmivKZUXfyIhjc5D4gE=&id=117373579 .

We don’t need to have the campaign we’re building resort to cheap media takes and extremist rhetoric. We need a representative that will stand up for all of us. Sri will be that representative -- and if you agree, we need you to chip in to our goal so we can prove we have what it takes to win. Chip in now ➜ Let's get this done, --Team Sri Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [] Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [] Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Friend,

My team has sent a number of emails this week, so I wanted to take a moment and explain why these emails are so important to our campaign.

The truth is, my life's work has always been about fixing injustices in our society and improving the quality of life for our communities. Public service was never about politics or just winning a congressional race. This is about truly addressing the issues we face -- whether we’re talking about expanding affordable housing, ending poverty, achieving environmental justice, or fighting for universal health care for all.

**That's why I made the decision to refuse all corporate PAC money. In fact, the vast majority of the money we raise comes from lots of individual donors making small contributions. And that usually happens in response to emails just like this one!**

This is why I'm asking once again:

**[Will you add a $3 donation before our FEC deadline? We're trying to raise $45,000 in online contributions before June 30, and any amount you contribute will go a long way in helping us reach this mark.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18028063/214514829/1147193815?refcode=em-200626-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTBkMWU2Ny1kYmI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OX_KZB_C4fAvjoN8Pwfr5enLo_MGNGCOY2VtGo2GNo=)**

clean_body: | Friend, My team has sent a number of emails this week, so I wanted to take a moment and explain why these emails are so important to our campaign. The truth is, my life's work has always been about fixing injustices in our society and improving the quality of life for our communities. Public service was never about politics or just winning a congressional race. This is about truly addressing the issues we face -- whether we’re talking about expanding affordable housing, ending poverty, achieving environmental justice, or fighting for universal health care for all. That's why I made the decision to refuse all corporate PAC money. In fact, the vast majority of the money we raise comes from lots of individual donors making small contributions. And that usually happens in response to emails just like this one! This is why I'm asking once again: = If you've save your information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | | **= ** | **= **** | | = ** | **= **** | | = ** | **= **** Thank you, Georgette Gómez | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. | A Message from Matt!
---
"Let NH Voters Decide NH Elections!" Hello everyone! This past week, we became the first major NH campaign to resume live, in-person campaign events starting with our 2nd Amendment celebration event in Londonderry, and then 5 different house parties in Durham, Greenland, Derry, Exeter and Center Tuftonboro! It feels so great to meet with people in-person again and not from behind a computer screen \- after all, NH has always been a place where the voters expect to meet their elected officials and size them up to weed out the frauds. I wouldn't have it any other way! Speaking of NH elected officials, our campaign also rolled out three prominent new endorsements from NH leaders; former NH Governor Steve Merrill, former NH Speaker of the House Gene Chandler and Executive Councilor Ted Gatsas. We are very proud to have the support of these three great Granite Staters! Thank you to everyone for your support and I'll see you on the campaign trail! \- Matt

| JOIN US TOMORROW, Saturday June 27th at 10am at an undisclosed location in Eastern Rockingham County for a great Explore NH event!

Join Matt Mayberry and let him show you one of the prettiest spots in all of New Hampshire. He has been to all 239 towns and cities in NH so he knows his way around! Sign up below and you will be given the location of the site to meet. We all get together and walk about one mile into the location. This is one that only the super locals know about so you know it will be good!

After the hike be sure to join Matt at the polls in the race for the GOP Congressional nomination on Sept 8th. Matt is the only veteran in the race and the only proven defender of our Second Amendment rights in the race for Congress.

Kids and dogs and bikes and all your friends are welcome to join us!! The trail is level and packed gravel. You will be walking about one mile one way so wear comfortable shoes. Snacks and refreshments will be at the location. Bring your cameras, its really pretty out there. Rain date will be Sunday June 28 at 10am. [More details here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUyMTk5MTUzMjMxNzMwMzk3JmM9ajhpNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjI5NzMyMzYmZD1jOGswdzR1.olvIviFhl51hmcyjdGj5Vc15rV0VZlN7VM_TnlVuPeI)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Are you still fed up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I don't know about you, but I am still fed up about Donald Trump coming to Arizona for a political circus at a time when our community is in pain from a pandemic, an economic downturn, and a crisis of racial justice.

**Trump 's campaign put his selfish political interests before the safety of _OUR_ community by having thousands of unmasked, closely-seated attendees at his rally, which could endanger the lives of Arizonans by spreading the COVID-19 virus. **

**To make matters worse, ****Trump resorted to divisive, racist tropes during his rally, including referring to the virus as the "kung flu."**

After this week, I am more determined than ever to do my part to drive voter turnout in Maricopa County this November to help Joe Biden win Arizona and to finally defeat Donald Trump.

[**Are you with me? Donate today to help my campaign turn out the voters we need to defeat Trump in Maricopa County >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nG9smB7nIW-_X-wFfhcZGaD0fD7p2s-eRFSUYXScpMY=/i5cBEE5pDxU6wid-MpjwHquFdJk8A-OCSZSpNH_LGQk=?refcode=X_062620_TrumpinPHX_D&amount=25)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/nG9smB7nIW-_X-wFfhcZGaD0fD7p2s-eRFSUYXScpMY=/i5cBEE5pDxU6wid-MpjwHquFdJk8A-OCSZSpNH_LGQk=?refcode=X_062620_TrumpinPHX_D&amount=25)

Together, we can restore real leadership for our community and our country,

\-- _Greg_

name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Anti-Muslim Bigot"
body:
Yesterday, a Florida paper, the _Sun Sentinel_ , released their endorsements in my race to win Florida’s 21st Congressional District.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061801-e5dd255a26-02cf987a9c)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c) Yesterday, a Florida paper, the _Sun Sentinel_ , released their endorsements in my race to win Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

When their editorial board reached out to my campaign, I made the decision to pass on wasting my time on this member of the “Fake News” media . . . after all, the _Sun Sentinel_ ’s editorial board endorsed Hillary Clinton in 2016. So, I wasn’t surprised they endorsed one of my Republican challengers in my August primary.

It was clear from their other endorsements, they selected the WEAKEST Republican candidates to take on their Democrat friends.

And who did they endorse in the Democrat Primary for President Trump’s home district? My opponent of course, “Lazy” Lois Frankel.

In the _Sun Sentinel_ ’s glowing endorsement of Frankel, I noticed one GLARING set of facts that were missing . . . **her accomplishments**.

Despite her nearly eight years as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives, what has Lazy Lois accomplished?

Hold on and let me look . . . . . . . . . . .

.
.
.
.
. . . that’s right, **NOTHING!**

Another line that stood out in this fake news endorsement of Frankel was when she was questioned about voting to support a new aircraft carrier that the Navy didn’t need. Frankel’s response?

**She “didn’t remember that vote” and “probably followed the lead of a subcommittee chair.”**

**Basically, Frankel voted “yes” on a bill she didn’t read that had a price tag of $13.3 BILLION!**

And that’s why she’s called LAZY Lois Frankel.

But within the _Sun Sentinel_ ’s multiple endorsement articles, they still dedicated a good deal of their column space to my race, **calling me a “conspiracy theorist” and “anti-Muslim bigot.”**

Ha! And here’s the kicker. In their endorsement of one of the Republicans running against me, **they admitted that he is going to lose to me**.

As the _Sun Sentinel_ ’s paper lands in the hands of their 100,000 readers this morning, help me send a strong message that their days of influence are over.

[**Help me raise $100,000 in our final push before the end of the quarter.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c)

There are just FOUR DAYS LEFT before the end of the second fundraising quarter.

We’re up in the polls, and we’ve CRUSHED every opponent in all of the other fundraising quarters . . . [and this time around, we’re going to SHOCK them](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c).

[**I need you to be one of the 10,000 patriots who pitches in just $10 today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c)

We’re going to prove to them that dying, liberal publications carry no weight these days.

It’s about us, the voters on the street who are willing to work to Make America Great Again!

[**Donate today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c)

Thanks again for all you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I’m so glad I didn’t waste my time genuflecting to the _Sun Sentinel_ ’s “editorial board” that didn’t think twice about slandering me with lies. My Republican challenger showed up and gleefully responded to their useless questions knowing full well they would never endorse him in the General Election. Republicans need to stop playing along with the liberal media and be bold enough to simply walk away and let leftist publications talk amongst themselves. [**So let’s show them how it’s done. Donate $10 now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381550-899050-5061799-0880898222-02cf987a9c)

clean_body: Yesterday, a Florida paper, the Sun Sentinel , released their endorsements in my race to win Florida’s 21st Congressional District. | | | Patriot, Yesterday, a Florida paper, the Sun Sentinel , released their endorsements in my race to win Florida’s 21st Congressional District. When their editorial board reached out to my campaign, I made the decision to pass on wasting my time on this member of the “Fake News” media . . . after all, the Sun Sentinel ’s editorial board endorsed Hillary Clinton in 2016. So, I wasn’t surprised they endorsed one of my Republican challengers in my August primary. It was clear from their other endorsements, they selected the WEAKEST Republican candidates to take on their Democrat friends. And who did they endorse in the Democrat Primary for President Trump’s home district? My opponent of course, “Lazy” Lois Frankel. In the Sun Sentinel ’s glowing endorsement of Frankel, I noticed one GLARING set of facts that were missing . . . her accomplishments. Despite her nearly eight years as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives, what has Lazy Lois accomplished? Hold on and let me look . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . that’s right, NOTHING! Another line that stood out in this fake news endorsement of Frankel was when she was questioned about voting to support a new aircraft carrier that the Navy didn’t need. Frankel’s response? She “didn’t remember that vote” and “probably followed the lead of a subcommittee chair.” Basically, Frankel voted “yes” on a bill she didn’t read that had a price tag of $13.3 BILLION! And that’s why she’s called LAZY Lois Frankel. But within the Sun Sentinel ’s multiple endorsement articles, they still dedicated a good deal of their column space to my race, calling me a “conspiracy theorist” and “anti-Muslim bigot.” Ha! And here’s the kicker. In their endorsement of one of the Republicans running against me, they admitted that he is going to lose to me. As the Sun Sentinel ’s paper lands in the hands of their 100,000 readers this morning, help me send a strong message that their days of influence are over. There are just FOUR DAYS LEFT before the end of the second fundraising quarter. We’re up in the polls, and we’ve CRUSHED every opponent in all of the other fundraising quarters . . . . We’re going to prove to them that dying, liberal publications carry no weight these days. It’s about us, the voters on the street who are willing to work to Make America Great Again! Thanks again for all you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer P.S. I’m so glad I didn’t waste my time genuflecting to the Sun Sentinel ’s “editorial board” that didn’t think twice about slandering me with lies. My Republican challenger showed up and gleefully responded to their useless questions knowing full well they would never endorse him in the General Election. Republicans need to stop playing along with the liberal media and be bold enough to simply walk away and let leftist publications talk amongst themselves. subject: Extraordinary Love in Our Community

body:

| Dear Friend,

Today marks the five year anniversary of the Obergefell v. Hodges landmark opinion by the Supreme Court making marriage equality the law of the land. This past Sunday, on June 21, 2020, Rita and I celebrated our 10th anniversary of legal marriage in Massachusetts.

[**This is our story.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8ed45be24a&e=5886ca081d)

The bigger story is the ability for all people to live in right relationship in wholesome openness and goodness. It is having one’s love and commitment to each other witnessed, seen, and supported. That witness comes with accountability and communal resources. Living hidden because of oppression and prejudice does not foster life. It is unhealthy for all persons and the community itself.

Being married has allowed Rita and I and other same-gendered couples to live our reality authentically and with greater freedom. Marriage is a civil contract and now a legal right for all. Rita and I talk about our marriage as sacramental. What we mean by that is making visible an invisible reality.

There is extraordinary love in our community, and we feel blessed to be able to participate openly in that love.

Happy Marriage Equality Day, Everyone!

Pat
---
| [INVEST IN EQUALTIY](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c7e5b3f9af&e=5886ca081d "INVEST IN EQUALTIY")

| | **-June 26, 2020-** **-Myers' and Lawson's plan to REFORM-** **** Dr. Woody Myers and Linda Lawson introduced their [Criminal Justice R.E.F.O.R.M. Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029979/214548309/1684646395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535), a six-tenet plan designed to combat racial disparities in Indiana's criminal justice system. Here's the plan: R- Repair the criminal justice system by expanding intervention efforts to keep people out of traditional courts and prisons E- End police brutality with new training procedures to eliminate excessive force F- Funding an intersectional approach to public safety by reprioritizing taxpayers dollars O- Oversight through no-tolerance accountability policies and procedures R- Rebuild our communities by investing in sustainable community development M- Marijuana decriminalization In Indiana, Black adults are [5 times more likely](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029980/214548310/995265896?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) to be sent to prison than white adults. This plan introduces a holistic, more equitable approach to criminal justice designed to eradicate the disproportionate effects of the system on Black and Brown Hoosiers. You can read Dr. Myers' full plan here: [Criminal Justice R.E.F.O.R.M.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029981/214548311/1684646395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) **-Weinzapfel defends the ACA-** **** This week, Democratic AG Candidate, Jonathan Weinzapfel, spoke at the Democratic Attorneys General Association's "[On The Trail: Candidate Health Care Forum](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029982/214548312/1281623219?t=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535)." "It really is up to us as Democratic candidates for Attorney General to really be there on the front lines and support these families, make sure they have opportunities to succeed, and I really think that starts with [preserving the Affordable Care Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029983/214548313/1281623219?t=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535)." - Weinzapfel As Weinzapfel continues to underscore the importance of affordable health care for all Hoosiers, every single one of his Republican counterparts has vowed to [terminate the ACA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029984/214548314/8016812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) as soon they take office. The good news is: the Cook Political Report moved the Indiana Attorney General's race from "leans Republican" to toss-up! This year, we can put a Democrat in the AG's office and ensure that Hoosiers keep their health care. **-Holcomb's scrawny plan to address unemployment-** **** Last Friday, the Holcomb administration confirmed an estimated [408,000 Hoosiers are out of work](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029985/214548315/-836642703?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535). [More than 3 out of 4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029986/214548316/-1006999382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) Hoosiers working in manufacturing who lost their job in February are still out of work. It's almost as bad for Hoosiers who worked in the leisure and hospitality industry, where [93,000 or 72%](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029987/214548317/-2080741531?emci=fccdabb0-34b3-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=) are still without work. And Indiana's unemployment numbers are getting worse, not better. This week marked the second straight week of an [increase in unemployment claims](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029988/214548318/376447196?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) with 32% more people filing for unemployment week-over-week. So what's Governor Holcomb's plan to combat what was the [worst unemployment rate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18029989/214548319/-2113028332?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjU1MDQ2My1lOGI3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hNeeOOY_R7Sr5G60DyEKarwaFiLYp_covDyBt4w17E=&emci=825ce60d-b2b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=8b550463-e8b7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) in Indiana since the Great Depression? clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -June 26, 2020- -Myers' and Lawson's plan to REFORM- ** Dr. Woody Myers and Linda Lawson introduced their , a six-tenet plan designed to combat racial disparities in Indiana's criminal justice system. Here's the plan: R- Repair the criminal justice system by expanding intervention efforts to keep people out of traditional courts and prisons E- End police brutality with new training procedures to eliminate excessive force F- Funding an intersectional approach to public safety by reprioritizing taxpayers dollars O- Oversight through no-tolerance accountability policies and procedures R- Rebuild our communities by investing in sustainable community development M- Marijuana decriminalization In Indiana, Black adults are to be sent to prison than white adults. This plan introduces a holistic, more equitable approach to criminal justice designed to eradicate the disproportionate effects of the system on Black and Brown Hoosiers. You can read Dr. Myers' full plan here: -Weinzapfel defends the ACA- This week, Democratic AG Candidate, Jonathan Weinzapfel, spoke at the Democratic Attorneys General Association's "." "It really is up to us as Democratic candidates for Attorney General to really be there on the front lines and support these families, make sure they have opportunities to succeed, and I really think that starts with ." - Weinzapfel As Weinzapfel continues to underscore the importance of affordable health care for all Hoosiers, every single one of his Republican counterparts has vowed to as soon they take office. The good news is: the Cook Political Report moved the Indiana Attorney General's race from "leans Republican" to toss-up! This year, we can put a Democrat in the AG's office and ensure that Hoosiers keep their health care. -Holcomb's scrawny plan to address unemployment- Last Friday, the Holcomb administration confirmed an estimated . Hoosiers working in manufacturing who lost their job in February are still out of work. It's almost as bad for Hoosiers who worked in the leisure and hospitality industry, where = are still without work. And Indiana's unemployment numbers are getting worse, not better. This week marked the second straight week of an with 32% more people filing for unemployment week-over-week. So what's Governor Holcomb's plan to combat what was the in Indiana since the Great Depression? Allocate just enough CARES Act dollars to put somewhere around = back to work. At best, Holcomb's plan will help put about 9% of 400,000+ Hoosiers back to work. What about the other 365,000 Hoosiers in need of work? The house is burning down, and Eric Holcomb is trying to put it out with a squirt gun. -Curtis Hill's Latest Attack on LGBTQ+ Families- On June 15th, Hill made his Hoosier families with LGBTQ+ parents. The disgraced AG candidate asked the U.S. Supreme Court to review the ruling that same-sex couples should have as parents on birth certificates without going through the expense of an adoption process. Federal courts have ruled that this is a matter of marriage, allowing same-sex couples the same parental rights as heterosexual parents. But that hasn't stopped Hill from trying to repeal the ruling and rob LBGTQ+ parents of their rights. Bottom line: Nothing will stop Hill from attacking members of the LGBTQ+ community. We can't let him serve another term. -Trump puts political gain before American lives- = At his rally last weekend, Trump told supporters that he asked his administration to slow down COVID-19 testing. Time and time again, health care officials have warned us: to stopping the spread. So why did the President ask his administration to slow down testing? Less testing = less documented cases of COVID-19. He's playing Russian Roulette with our lives so he can forge a successful coronavirus response. More than from COVID-19. Hundreds of thousands of people have lost their loved ones. And Trump wants to cut the one thing that could prevent this from happening again. We established a = to make sure we don't have to endure another four years of this. = This is how we are going to elect a president that puts American lives before cheap political scams. -Resources- Sign our petition to stand up for Black Hoosiers =. Read our blog post on how to be an ally to Black and brown communities =. Sign our petition to call on the Indiana Election Division to make the 2020 general election a no-fault absentee election for all Hoosier voters . Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: The One About the End of Legislative Session

body:
LOVE IS LOVE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Marriage%20Equality%20%281%29.png]
Five years ago today, the highest court in the land, The United States Supreme Court affirmed every single American has the right to love and marry who they want. We celebrate this victory for the LGTBQ+ community and promise to continue to fight for their rights. The Tennessee Democratic Party is committed to electing and uplifting public servants who honor basic human rights for all, including the LGTBQ+ community.
ON THIS WEEK'S EPISODE OF
TRUMP'S FAILED LEADERSHIP
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/500w.png]
JOIN US TO PROTECT THE VOTE!
A Zoom Event in support of the TNDP
Voter Protection Program
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/730w%20Protect-the-Vote%20Facebook%20Event%20copy.png] The vote is more important in 2020 than ever before. As our nation is in crisis, Republicans are deploying tactics to keep people from voting. We must protect the vote. Join us Tuesday, June 30th 5:30CT for a roundtable discussion with TNDP Chair Mary Mancini, Tricia Herzfeld, Reyna Walters-Morgan, and Kendra Lee. All tickets and sponsorships will go directly toward TNDP's 2020 Voter Protection Program.
Tickets are $25.00 and sponsorship opportunities are available.
Sponsorships start at $100 & up. Tickets are $25.00. Register now! [https://tndp.org/protect-vote-fundraiser/?emci=52b6e0ab-6eb5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-26%20at%2011.54.34%20AM.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-26%20at%2011.54.05%20AM.png]

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Why I'm supporting Jay Inslee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Gun safety is a leading issue -- and Jay's leading on it.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Jay Inslee is a proven champion on gun safety, and we must help reelect him in 2020. There is so much at stake this election year. That's why it is so important to support Governor Inslee, a tireless ally in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. We need his leadership now more than ever. **[Will you make a donation of $5 or more to support Jay Inslee's reelection as governor of Washington today?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9189?t=5&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ) We need leaders like him fighting for us in Washington state if we want to end our nation's gun violence crisis.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9190?t=6&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9191?t=7&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9192?t=8&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9193?t=9&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9194?t=10&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9189?t=11&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)
---
Every year that passes we see more and more candidates stepping up to run for office with gun safety as one of their leading issues -- 2020 is no different.
We are seeing candidates running from the state and local level all the way up to the presidential level who are making gun safety a priority.
Jay's one of them, and his record proves it.
As governor, Jay has made Washington state a trailblazer on gun safety. He implemented and stood up for Washington's voter-approved initiative to require expanded background checks and to ban people under 21 from purchasing semi-automatic rifles. He also signed legislation banning bump stocks and funded a program that removed hundreds of them off the street.
Finally, Jay stood up to Donald Trump -- in person and on national television -- after the president suggested that we should arm teachers to prevent school shootings. I was proud to hear Jay tell President Trump he should try "less tweeting" and "more listening." That's real leadership, and it's what Washington state and this country needs right now.
**I'm excited to work hard with all of you this year to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot who will be allies in our fight to end gun violence. That includes Jay Inslee -- and he needs our help now.[Will you donate $5 or more to support his reelection as governor of Washington right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9189?t=12&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)**
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9189?t=13&akid=8078%2E868730%2EMRGCdJ)

If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now, Thanks, and take care. Friend, Jay Inslee is a proven champion on gun safety, and we must help reelect him in 2020. There is so much at stake this election year. That's why it is so important to support Governor Inslee, a tireless ally in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. We need his leadership now more than ever. We need leaders like him fighting for us in Washington state if we want to end our nation's gun violence crisis. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Every year that passes we see more and more candidates stepping up to run for office with gun safety as one of their leading issues -- 2020 is no different. We are seeing candidates running from the state and local level all the way up to the presidential level who are making gun safety a priority. Jay's one of them, and his record proves it. As governor, Jay has made Washington state a trailblazer on gun safety. He implemented and stood up for Washington's voter-approved initiative to require expanded background checks and to ban people under 21 from purchasing semi-automatic rifles. He also signed legislation banning bump stocks and funded a program that removed hundreds of them off the street. Finally, Jay stood up to Donald Trump -- in person and on national television -- after the president suggested that we should arm teachers to prevent school shootings. I was proud to hear Jay tell President Trump he should try "less tweeting" and "more listening." That's real leadership, and it's what Washington state and this country needs right now. I'm excited to work hard with all of you this year to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot who will be allies in our fight to end gun violence. That includes Jay Inslee -- and he needs our help now. My very best, Gabby Giffords

name: Mike Thompson
subject: we have a lot of work ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IoV831gozwY16Ey93RaF6UBaPPX-RnvIIGGVaB9vwoU=/JDUw1cb9zmKmooA4shtSU2zsrj2c3cKItWAuUxSh5lk=)

These last few weeks have been a wake up call for so many of us across our nation. Structural inequities have allowed racism, discrimination, violence and injustice to persist for far too long and we must take action now.

Congress is stepping up and taking action to right these wrongs and move us farther along in our fight for full equality and justice for all. Yesterday the House passed the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act which would increase accountability in policing through the court system, ban racial profiling, require officers to use de-escalation tactics before employing deadly force, and much more.

This is just a start. We will continue taking action and I know, together, we will see a much needed change in America. I stand against injustice, and with your help, we will enact long overdue reform.

My heart goes out to all those hurting. I hear you and I support you.

In solidarity,

Mike Thompson

| _**To stay up to date with the latest news and safety tips on the coronavirus, please visit the _[CDC website](https://act.myngp.com/el/IoV831gozwY16Ey93RaF6UBaPPX-RnvIIGGVaB9vwoU=/UyZJdRtNvxsQBnhXKWZkbmiB7ZkSQft9FEC_uduch-Y=)_.** _

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Can you chip in $2 or whatever you can before Tuesday's fundraising deadline to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We're facing our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight on Tuesday. After the deadline, we'll be able to see what resources we have and see how much work we'll be able to do this summer | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525086/45c30650/1ced6bc4c/66e99b35/2622256404/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Right now, Elizabeth and volunteers across the country are working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November.

And we've made big strides. **This week alone, we celebrated the victories of candidates Elizabeth was proud to endorse, like Jamaal Bowman, Mondaire Jones, and Catalina Cruz.**

And it's all thanks to grassroots donors and volunteers.

But now, we're facing our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight on Tuesday. After the deadline, we'll be able to see what resources we have and see how much work we'll be able to do this summer to help elect more Warren Democrats across the country.

So, we'll get to it: We want these fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible. But right now, we're a little behind where we want to be to hit our goal.

**[What happens between now and Tuesday is powerfully important-- and every bit counts. name: Eileen Filler-Corn
subject: Why I'm Endorsing Mark Warner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

**I 'm excited to endorse my good friend, the one and only Mark Warner, for re-election to the United States Senate.** I had the honor of working on his team when he was Governor of Virginia and I got to see up close what strong and effective governing looks like. Under Mark's leadership, Pew Charitable Trusts ranked Virginia as one of the best-managed states in the nation -- and it's clear why. Mark was an advocate for every Virginian during his time as governor, working to expand rural broadband, increase job opportunities in the Commonwealth, and make health care more affordable. He's continued to advocate for us in the Senate. **[If you're able, will you donate now to re-elect Mark to the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c88475c/2185691799/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")** **Mark 's work in the U.S. Senate has continued to move Virginia forward and has paved the way for dozens of great new Democratic leaders across the Commonwealth.** Just look at what happened in the last General Assembly election! Since taking back both houses in January, we have done more in one legislative session to improve life in the Commonwealth than the other party had during their two decades of control. This session, the General Assembly passed legislation that strengthens our democracy, makes our environment cleaner, our communities safer and so much more.

I'm extremely proud of what we've all accomplished together. And as long as Mark is in the Senate fighting for us, I know we can continue to move Virginia forward. But his re-election is not certain. **Republican Daniel Gade was just nominated to replace him and is eager to undo the progress that Mark -- and all of us -- have fought so hard to achieve in Virginia.**

We need to do everything we can to keep Mark in the Senate and to keep moving Virginia forward. Will you join me right now in supporting Mark's re-election? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c88475b/2185691799/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5") [DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c88475a/2185691799/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10") [DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c884759/2185691799/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25") [DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c884758/2185691799/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50") [DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c884747/2185691799/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100") [CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d411/53d9897e/54a2c9bc/1c884746/2185691799/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200626_f_1_nd__628__&refcode2=express_lane_other") Thank you,

Eileen Filler-Corn
Speaker, Virginia House of Delegates

Peter, **This is Dr. Abdul El-Sayed. ** I am proud to endorse my friend Mike Siegel for Congress in the Texas 10th district. Mike understands we must fight for Medicare for All because healthcare is our right, not the privilege of a small few. Medicare for All will play a critical role in uprooting the most systemic inequities in our healthcare system that impact communities of color most of all, freeing us from the deductibles, co-pays, and premiums that keep so many away from the healthcare they need. Mike believes in what we can do when we come together in this country — that together, we can achieve anything that we put our minds to. We can’t compromise before we even get to the table. We must center the people who don’t have those seats at the table, the people Mike has been fighting for his whole career. And that means we must demand bold change. body:
Hagerty and his White House allies want to rip health care away from more than a million Tennesseans.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13a/18d6a294/4c907a1d/26d7ff88/3936575940/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | In the middle of the night, our opponent Bill Hagerty's allies in this Administration asked the Supreme Court to strike down the Affordable Care Act in its entirety -- **_during a pandemic._** Worse is that they're specifically targeting **pre-existing conditions**. With 1.3 million, Tennessee has the _third-highest-percentage_ of residents with pre-existing conditions nationwide. And, starting at the State of the Union and all throughout this year, Bill Hagerty's biggest supporter has promised to protect coverage for those with pre-existing conditions -- and is doing the exact opposite at a time when we need health care more than ever. [_**Access to health care is a right and I will fight to protect it as the next senator for Tennessee. But I need your help before the FEC deadline -- if you can, will you make a contribution to our campaign?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13a/18d6a294/4c907a1d/26d7ff89/3936575940/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200626?refcode=jme200626_m_other&refcode2=107423") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13a/18d6a294/4c907a1d/26d7fff6/3936575940/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MjYiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200626?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200626_m_&refcode2=107423")

As a member of a White House COVID Task Force, Bill Hagerty is in deep with these folks hurting Tennessee, and he's pledged to be a rubber stamp for their special interest agenda -- just like Marsha Blackburn.
[_**I 'm in this fight to stop another extremist from making it to the Senate and destroying health care for millions of Tennesseans. If you can, chip in before the FEC deadline.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13a/18d6a294/4c907a1d/26d7ff89/3936575940/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200626?refcode=jme200626_m_other&refcode2=107423")
I launched my campaign at a closed rural hospital in McKenzie, Tennessee, for a reason.
Our state has the highest rate of rural hospital closures per person in the country -- and three more have closed just in the time since I launched my campaign.
**Tennesseans are already facing extraordinary barriers to access health care, and Hagerty and the Administration want to make it much worse during a pandemic.**
[_**If you are able, chip in before the FEC deadline to flip this crucial seat in the Senate, flip the Senate Majority, and protect health care for all Tennesseans.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13a/18d6a294/4c907a1d/26d7ff89/3936575940/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200626?refcode=jme200626_m_other&refcode2=107423")
In service,
James

body:
Election Day is almost upon us! On Tuesday, voters across CD-5 will head to the polls, and I need you to be one of them. Dear Peter, Election Day is almost upon us! On Tuesday, voters across CD-5 will head to the polls, and __**I need you to be one of them**__. | | **State Revenue Down 13%** While my tax-loving opponent is busy attacking me, we have more important issues to discuss! **The Legislative Fiscal Division is expecting a 13% drop in revenue during the next fiscal year.** The Covid-19 pandemic has created a lot of uncertainty in our economy and we must work to find solutions that support all Montanans, small businesses, and Montana industry. Many hard decisions lie ahead. Growing government is never the answer. **Raising taxes on Montanans is NOT an option.** Especially at a time when small businesses are struggling to navigate the pandemic and recovery and some are fighting to survive. _We need to continue to protect Montanans from bad actors but streamline efficiencies that give businesses the ability to grow._ Let’s work together on making Montana more attractive for companies looking to do business in the Treasure State. The next State Auditor will face issues we have never seen. We will have to make very difficult decisions to keep the ship afloat. _Troy Downing has the business experience, industry experience, and courage to make hard decisions and get the job done for Montana families. _ Donate today to help protect the future of Montana. Thank you!

clean_body: | | | | | State Revenue Down 13% While my tax-loving opponent is busy attacking me, we have more important issues to discuss! The Legislative Fiscal Division is expecting a 13% drop in revenue during the next fiscal year. The Covid-19 pandemic has created a lot of uncertainty in our economy and we must work to find solutions that support all Montanans, small businesses, and Montana industry. Many hard decisions lie ahead. Growing government is never the answer. Raising taxes on Montanans is NOT an option. Especially at a time when small businesses are struggling to navigate the pandemic and recovery and some are fighting to survive. We need to continue to protect Montanans from bad actors but streamline efficiencies that give businesses the ability to grow. Let’s work together on making Montana more attractive for companies looking to do business in the Treasure State. The next State Auditor will face issues we have never seen. We will have to make very difficult decisions to keep the ship afloat. Troy Downing has the business experience, industry experience, and courage to make hard decisions and get the job done for Montana families. Donate today to help protect the future of Montana. name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Shaheen's Spending Spree, More Democrat Obstruction, and Corky's interview on NH Now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78817a0516edcd6d/efb45b1aa46d440ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky Condemns D.C. Jeanne Shaheen’s Vote Against Public Debate on Police Reform**
This week, Senate Republicans’ police reform bill stalled after Senate Democrats voted against starting debate on the measure and demanded bipartisan talks. This happened even as Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina, shown here, the Senate’s only black Republican, pleaded with them to vote in favor of publicly debating its merits and/or shortfalls.

Corky pointed out in his interview with NH Now’s Chris Ryan (see link below) that New Hampshire’s Senator Shaheen and other Democrats should at least have allowed the debate to begin.

“Jeanne Shaheen voted no, she voted against debating that bill in front of the American people. And that’s because the progressives in D.C. do not want exposed the politics they’re playing with this,” he told Ryan. “And even after that debate...the legislative process in the U.S. Senate, after that debate, it would have taken another 60 votes to move the debated bill forward to passage, so there was no risk yesterday in debating the bill, other than allowing the American people to see who was taking what position on police reform. That’s the type of stuff we’re going to expose on D.C. Jeanne Shaheen. She’s loyal to the progressives in the U.S. Senate, she would not vote to have that bill go into the debate..and that’s not in the best interest of the people of New Hampshire.

“It’s important for these debates to happen in public so people can see what’s going on...But the Democrats and D.C. Jeanne Shaheen are not even allowing us to proceed to an open debate. The people in New Hampshire want to see what our politicians believe and what their positions are.”
|
---
**Op-Ed: Senator Shaheen’s Spending Spree**
Corky wrote an op-ed that appeared in the June 26 edition of the Union Leader, focusing on U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen’s call for more COVID-19 relief funding.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78817a0516edcd6d/407de0c364bbc42dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
As Corky points out, “Calling for billions more in federal spending as the nation emerges from the COVID-19 pandemic poses a threat to an economy that shows signs of roaring back to pre-pandemic levels. We are no longer in crisis mode, and with many states reopening and folks heading back to work, the financial landscape has changed since the early days of our public health crisis and accompanying economic free fall.”

[**Read more**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78817a0516edcd6d/affb7426046a835cc3d6b838967d376c/33153).
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78817a0516edcd6d/97c8a8be2a06facec3d6b838967d376c/33153)
**[Listen in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78817a0516edcd6d/5b2418449d80110ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)** as Corky chats with WKXL NH Now host Chris Ryan about the Trump endorsement, and his strategies in taking on incumbent Jeanne Shaheen in the weeks to come.
