clean_body: Tap or click to read more >> Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | | Corky Condemns D.C. Jeanne Shaheen’s Vote Against Public Debate on Police Reform This week, Senate Republicans’ police reform bill stalled after Senate Democrats voted against starting debate on the measure and demanded bipartisan talks. This happened even as Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina, shown here, the Senate’s only black Republican, pleaded with them to vote in favor of publicly debating its merits and/or shortfalls. Corky pointed out in his interview with NH Now’s Chris Ryan (see link below) that New Hampshire’s Senator Shaheen and other Democrats should at least have allowed the debate to begin. “Jeanne Shaheen voted no, she voted against debating that bill in front of the American people. And that’s because the progressives in D.C. do not want exposed the politics they’re playing with this,” he told Ryan. “And even after that debate...the legislative process in the U.S. Senate, after that debate, it would have taken another 60 votes to move the debated bill forward to passage, so there was no risk yesterday in debating the bill, other than allowing the American people to see who was taking what position on police reform. That’s the type of stuff we’re going to expose on D.C. Jeanne Shaheen. She’s loyal to the progressives in the U.S. Senate, she would not vote to have that bill go into the debate..and that’s not in the best interest of the people of New Hampshire. “It’s important for these debates to happen in public so people can see what’s going on...But the Democrats and D.C. Jeanne Shaheen are not even allowing us to proceed to an open debate. The people in New Hampshire want to see what our politicians believe and what their positions are.” | Op-Ed: Senator Shaheen’s Spending Spree Corky wrote an op-ed that appeared in the June 26 edition of the Union Leader, focusing on U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen’s call for more COVID-19 relief funding. As Corky points out, “Calling for billions more in federal spending as the nation emerges from the COVID-19 pandemic poses a threat to an economy that shows signs of roaring back to pre-pandemic levels. | | Peter, Senator Cornyn has spent the last 18 years fighting AGAINST our health care. He _voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act_ , then turned around and said it was a good thing Texans could get health care coverage under the law. **His hypocrisy is dangerous and Texans see right through it.**

Polling shows Senator Cornyn's approval ratings are underwater -- and 34% of Texans are undecided in the general election. **This is anyone 's race as long as we have the resources to secure every vote we can. [Will you help me win in November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890195/7f51f7bc/415c60b2/4ef63655/1824373192/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-defeatc?refcode=email_20200626.2nd__1604__&amount=10")** **[PITCH IN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890195/7f51f7bc/415c60b2/4ef63655/1824373192/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-defeatc?refcode=email_20200626.2nd__1604__&amount=10")** Big Pharma and the insurance industry are propping up Senator Cornyn big-time with huge donations to his campaign. Meanwhile, I'm not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. I'm relying on **you** because when I get to the Senate, I intend to serve **you.**

**So, if you can, please pitch in to help us flip Texas so we can finally elect a Senate that fights for your health care and works for ALL Texans, not just the special interests.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
The FEC end-of-quarter deadline is approaching quickly. We need your help to hit our $60,000 goal, but first let me tell you why this deadline is so important:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

The FEC end-of-quarter deadline is approaching quickly. We need your help to hit our $60,000 goal, but first let me tell you why this deadline is so important:

In just a few days, our fundraising numbers are going to be made public for only the second time ever. This is such an important moment for the campaign, eyes are on us. One of our Republican opponents has already called Michelle a "formidable opponent," and we know they'll be looking at what we raise to judge whether this grassroots team truly has what it takes to win.

We know we can elect Michelle to lift up our voices in Congress, but it's crucial we hit our end-of-quarter goal so we can show our strength and have the resources it takes to win.

subject: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate
body:
Senator Portman reached out the other day about joining the team but according to our records you haven’t become a Founding Member yet. We need....... Peter, this can’t be right.....
Senator Portman reached out the other day about joining the team but according to our records you haven’t become a Founding Member yet.
We need trusted conservatives like you on our side, otherwise we will be in serious trouble. The far-left is united by billionaires from New York and California looking to fundamentally transform our way of life.
**[Peter, we need your help! Will you join the team?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=54fd6161c07f4ea788c0e6b8a57bcb69&_e=CQ4DNzVo126S64UZ7f-IR1G9DkrI-LGgtdnJk2bMg37-hhfHqGZCBFz0jjB42_MTkjLufS5j61whLpzKu_chGYitIWKJoDS0RBuB8b2LlOcrqxPiuSM8I00sqsTsbnJBPh8p9zM5HEB3oVeLIoXZqSNdkL_PGIqNhlekkZahdPlQI37H9RMnizQvMUuDzFvdmT1ZJW_MInsDI-QDzskePYN9-Wxrf0MXE6CHjMfmwzWR0iJibI4jTKZj9mlsZAXY5Lcmsg5C7lajCuDHaNDDGQoP70vyYilUeBn8C6QHhIVXhqSItRtQuxEUsRT93GQPqrWyfJxnrnRJOcId3G9vY5wlduG3qKxiwhThqP07ZjL2kEjEa7-tSB3Yv9dQAK5IcqXejmZpKrG0MmtSBrLfJc9iLF4HnsoEo0oTtaR9NoFsLOWqm4N6Aumu46gMu3KvDozFvrH1HboQ-nI_nb_i5w%3D%3D)**
We know this isn’t an easy ask, but it is critically important to not only the campaign but the future of this country. We need to be united so we can stand up to the barrage of attacks coming for us.
Thanks,
Team Portman
\----Forwarded Message Below----- Peter, I’m not going to sugar coat it, we are going to have a huge fight on our hands this year. Which is why we need to know exactly who is on our side when things get really tough.
Peter, we are putting together a list of Founding Members of this campaign. As a loyal conservative, I wanted to give you the first opportunity to join the team.
Liberal billionaires are determined to do everything they can to stop us dead in our tracks and fundamentally transform this country and the way we live.
I NEED YOU as a dedicated conservative I can count on. I will depend on you for advice and counsel throughout our campaign, not only this year, but for years to come. Likewise, I will share exclusive information that we have to keep you informed as an integral part of the team.
I trust you Peter and will need you every step of the way in this campaign. _**Official Founding Member Group

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Help me fire a nonessential government employee!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a business executive, so I'm all about cutting the waste and fat in government.
I can think of one employee in the bloated Federal Government I'd like to fire: NANCY PELOSI.
**_Have you heard about her latest shenanigans?_**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw)
---

Talking about passing bipartisan police reform legislation, Pelosi said:

_"I will only do that if you tell me that this legislation is worthy of George KIRBY's name."_

**_Maybe she meant George Floyd, but I think we can agree that she and Biden are not playing with a full deck!_**

Let's be real: Pelosi only knows partisanship and hate. She doesn't care about George Floyd at all!
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw)
---

The only way to get rid of this charlatan is to get rid of her whip and enabler, G.K. Butterfield.

Remember, this guy HATES North Carolina- he hates his own district and everyone in it! He spends all his time at his girlfriend's place in the Swamp. Completely out of touch with his district, never been challenged and easy to pick off.

I need your help to pick off this Swamp Monster and make sure Nancy Pelosi never wields the Speaker's gavel again!

[Will you help me beat anti-cop Socialist G.K. Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw) I had a goal of $60,000 raised this month, before the fundraising quarter ends. I'm still $34,120 short. I need your help- time is running out!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom

P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g09x_VxZMpNxmng&b=X.XPo7ZqYPyAoAlyOOt1uw) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Trump Wants Federal Hiring to Focus on Skills Over Degrees | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=400dfb87d9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Wants Federal Hiring to Focus on Skills Over Degrees**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3261e9221&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Associated Press_
President Trump signed an executive order today that prioritizes skills over degrees for many federal jobs. “Aides say the change will create more opportunities for Americans to work for the federal government,” Darlene Superville reports in _The_ _Associated Press._
---
|
---
| [**Trump Is Right About Police. We Ask Officers to Take on Too Many Duties.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5891685082&e=3ee4985eea)
_-USA Today_
“President Donald Trump’s executive order on policing has been pilloried by the 'defund the police' crowd who want substantial police reforms. But Trump’s approach represents the best hope yet for improving policing . . . By narrowing the role of policing, both police critics and supporters can achieve their aims,” Jason Johnson writes.

**MORE:** [Instead of joining bipartisan bill, Democrats choose to play politics](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e33dc169c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Boston Korean War Vet’s Family Thanks President Trump in Search for Remains**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd88762418&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Boston Herald_
“Army 1st Lt. Thomas J. Redgate is finally coming home to Massachusetts, decades after being killed in action during the Korean War,” Joe Dwinell writes in the _Boston Herald_. “Without President Trump, this never would have happened,” said Redgate’s nephew. “We are eternally grateful to him.”

🎬 **WATCH:**[President & First Lady honor 70th anniversary of Korean War](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75687dc217&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**'One Job at A Time' Strategy Brings Ship Construction to Marinette**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e183dce9f3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Wisconsin State Journal_
President Trump visited Wisconsin yesterday to celebrate a new $5.5 billion Navy shipbuilding contract. “Together, the Marinette shipyard’s contribution to America’s defenses and to job creation perfectly capture a key guiding principle of the Trump administration, namely, that ‘economic security is national security,’” White House Director of Trade & Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes.
---
|
---
| [**200 Judges: A Milestone for President Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec6fb28384&e=3ee4985eea)
_-USA Today_
“This week the Senate reached a milestone, confirming President Trump’s 200th judge,” Carrie Campbell Severino writes in _USA Today_. “The 200 confirmations occurred in the face of unprecedented obstacles. Democrats, intent for years on using the courts to impose their own policy agenda, abused one Senate process after another.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47b9081abb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7667e4bc5b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fcb4cc3cb6)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: A little good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
There have been a few bright spots of good news through this last week that have me feeling optimistic about the future of our state | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=673f28171f)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2ef988f928&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [Full Video: Watch the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9751fd3194&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Full Video: Watch the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention")
---
|
---
| **_A Little Good News_** Over the last few months, it’s sometimes felt like cancellations, restrictions and somber news have overwhelmed our lives as we’ve come to adapt to life during COVID-19. And while we’re still very much living through this pandemic, there have been a few bright spots of good news this last week that have me feeling optimistic about the future of our state – and I hope they’ll leave you feeling good, too.

First, last weekend your Indiana Republican Party had our first Super Saturday where we’ve spoken to Hoosiers by going door to door. We did it by staying socially distanced, and we wore our masks. I’m excited that we can start getting out again to talk with and listen to voters in person again.

Next, this week state convention ballots officially started to hit delegates’ mailboxes. While it’s disappointing that we couldn’t hold our convention in person, I’m still so excited to see this voting in action.

And finally, **Governor Holcomb** shared some really encouraging economic numbers this week. Indiana unemployment rates have dropped below the national average, while our labor participation rates are moving above the national average! He talks about it more in [this video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b675fae5f&e=1acd9bb3d6).

That’s while home sales are currently on pace to beat last year’s sales, and while single-family home building permits are stronger so far in 2020 than they were through this point of 2019.

I’m so proud of **Governor Holcomb’s** work leading our state, I’m proud of our progress, and I can’t wait to see what’s next! \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e4cd1d715&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Indiana: Back on Track_** Indiana is getting back on track! Our unemployment rate has dropped below the national average, and more Hoosiers are returning to work. But **Governor Holcomb** knows that there are still Hoosiers who are struggling.

That's why he's continuing his work on **President Donald Trump's**[American Workforce Policy Advisory Board](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e8042943fd&e=1acd9bb3d6), which met today at the White House. Here's what he had to say about his work on this critical board that's working to help Americans build their skills for high-wage, in-demand jobs: **“Now more than ever as Indiana and the country grapple with the economic impacts of COVID-19, I remain focused on investing in people and their potential. I‘m so pleased to partner with the Administration and our nation’s top leaders on the American Workforce Policy Advisory Board to share Hoosier successes and develop a strategy to empower the American workforce to better meet today’s challenges.”** To learn more about Governor Holcomb's workforce development initiative, Next Level Jobs, [click here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f64097d953&e=1acd9bb3d6).

And while many Hoosiers are struggling, **Governor Holcomb** is also putting federal CARES Act funding to work for Hoosiers who are having trouble paying their rent due to COVID-19.

The Indiana COVID-19 Rental Assistance Program will provide stability for 12,000 Hoosier households:
* Provides up to $500 per month for four months in rental assistance (a maximum of $2,000 in assistance) for those unable to pay rent due to COVID-19
* Assistance is available in 91 counties (Marion County will administer its own program with CARES Act funds)
* The state will make the rent payments directly to the landlord

Applications for assistance open on July 13. To learn more about qualifications and to appy, visit [indianahousingnow.org](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a1c162b33e&e=1acd9bb3d6) now.
---
|
---
| |
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Super Saturday was Super!_** Thank you to all of our grassroots volunteers for your work last weekend during another very successful Super Saturday! We were excited to talk with Hoosiers across the state about the results Republicans like **President Trump** , **Governor Holcomb** and our Congressional leaders are delivering every day.

Interested in helping elect more Republicans in 2020? [Sign-up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=927221afcb&e=1acd9bb3d6) and we'll get you plugged in for our next Super Saturday.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=329a58206e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_State Convention Voting is On!_** It was a big week! Delegates to the 2020 Indiana Republican State began to receive their ballots this week.
* If you’ve mailed in your ballot, [check here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8cd10b26f6&e=1acd9bb3d6) to see if it's been received by the independent accounting firm. We’ll update this page on July 1, July 2, and July 7.
* Remember, ballots must be received by the independent accounting firm by 5 p.m. ET on July 9.
* If you’re a delegate and you haven’t received your ballot by this Monday, please call us directly at 317-635-7561.

Our state convention webpage at [Indiana.gop/stateconvention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d6d4e1c671&e=1acd9bb3d6) continues to be updated with information about convention – including the full convention video and FAQs. Check it out!
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb**[announces ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e85a46c280&e=1acd9bb3d6)[$25 million renter's relief program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5c2626129&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[ _unveils website that connects veterans to Indiana jobs_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e184e2353c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=24fb92098e&e=1acd9bb3d6)[upports bill to make Juneteenth a federal holiday](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=56c74582bd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun** [introduces legislation supporting farmers & environment](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=72bb231f59&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[advocates for access to affordable, high-quality child care](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f055b211a4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks**[introduces bill protecting presidential monuments](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f724bfc855&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird**[cosponsors bill to boost semiconductor production](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc78582b58&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks**[votes "no" on the Democrat partisan police reform bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6296c9605a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence**[attends Trump rally in Tulsa](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b0433216f9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon**[meets with members of the Evansville Police Department](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=186ced5e3b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[ _addresses transportation laws in DRIVE-Safe Act_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=92c57dbead&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: There have been a few bright spots of good news through this last week that have me feeling optimistic about the future of our state | | | | | | | "Full Video: Watch the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention" | | A Little Good News Over the last few months, it’s sometimes felt like cancellations, restrictions and somber news have overwhelmed our lives as we’ve come to adapt to life during COVID-19. And while we’re still very much living through this pandemic, there have been a few bright spots of good news this last week that have me feeling optimistic about the future of our state – and I hope they’ll leave you feeling good, too. First, last weekend your Indiana Republican Party had our first Super Saturday where we’ve spoken to Hoosiers by going door to door. We did it by staying socially distanced, and we wore our masks. I’m excited that we can start getting out again to talk with and listen to voters in person again. Next, this week state convention ballots officially started to hit delegates’ mailboxes. While it’s disappointing that we couldn’t hold our convention in person, I’m still so excited to see this voting in action. And finally, Governor Holcomb shared some really encouraging economic numbers this week. Indiana unemployment rates have dropped below the national average, while our labor participation rates are moving above the national average! He talks about it more in . body:
I need your help to flip NY-22 from BLUE to RED [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=9ecd79e7cbae4af8ae6031f619806d38&_e=1Pj52fVdwp3Shuncy_l1sfD-SoPtatNc8HuoCdBFr2bIMBMK6_GZ2PyDGQwfV8EduJLgbHjvj3agXr7wdAShN4ihuKiBKWfjzyFDxlRkFlHr_15qY6WKa7w5c_qfPeRBNXB1rhbyOQDfi1AXAR7xrclN2jpGiOvTlpV5OnH4FkHuArGz791j9sZjsTymMXsS_6ndTl2eeetc7bIBUws2jOUqZullsp4B8-9pw_5uo-pNV2cNpSRIg9pgjnSyBV57Cfx5jGmKrBRHdosEgtHOQoWDpOVv2F9q3-HuFygAVaSzwWft6tQ0FRk7l55ThbGEK4b6gpvE4n63nR8HwD5S7rN_rUo6xo1tKH37V9x7fW-cLPCplkfn44yBnvuPYEsE_u3bwQnnD6p6nEFn-t4V7d7mDJAmLhCn1HYdZOUZLtMGBOVkeRiedrxgNFW0gmfZfdYAQ5Rb3BhgDKWdfGqY9GfcZyHRtMNKKhP4uJckiDc%3D) [**CHIP IN NOW >>>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=9ecd79e7cbae4af8ae6031f619806d38&_e=1Pj52fVdwp3Shuncy_l1sfD-SoPtatNc8HuoCdBFr2bIMBMK6_GZ2PyDGQwfV8EduJLgbHjvj3agXr7wdAShN4ihuKiBKWfjzyFDxlRkFlHr_15qY6WKa7w5c_qfPeRBNXB1rhbyOQDfi1AXAR7xrclN2jpGiOvTlpV5OnH4FkHuArGz791j9sZjsTymMXsS_6ndTl2eeetc7bIBUws2jOUqZullsp4B8-9pw_5uo-pNV2cNpSRIg9pgjnSyBV57Cfx5jGmKrBRHdosEgtHOQgutj9o9EM9i08f0lyqQpq7HFhVQVhUfV73L56M8R6C27rFZjc6rP9gtN09EbrX5p5oLPpR90_Dhd8lfcua4MX2KMufzPOoK6Y2O_8DtTgspeoPLOTv0NlQuMaQ0LLykKNyokVqyw7d4fsf4IwPNBH-NzN2sZXMRxqjFUFYtVXSgk1IUcSYrHV1LWnaCLOogtf2_dRBzOy6FGjQ85LcnEVo%3D) Friend, All eyes are on NY-22 after our primary victory on Tuesday – and now it’s time for us to make sure we’re in position for another strong performance on November 3rd!
**I’m on a mission to Make Upstate New York Great Again in 2020.**
That means cutting red tape in Washington to let our small businesses thrive again, supporting our teachers as they continue to adapt to COVID-19, and fighting for our military and our veterans as they face unprecedented challenges at home and abroad.
**This is what NY-22 has been asking for – but Anthony Brindisi won’t listen.** [**HELP ME MAKE UPSTATE NEW YORK GREAT AGAIN**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=9ecd79e7cbae4af8ae6031f619806d38&_e=1Pj52fVdwp3Shuncy_l1sfD-SoPtatNc8HuoCdBFr2bIMBMK6_GZ2PyDGQwfV8EduJLgbHjvj3agXr7wdAShN4ihuKiBKWfjzyFDxlRkFlHr_15qY6WKa7w5c_qfPeRBNXB1rhbyOQDfi1AXAR7xrclN2jpGiOvTlpV5OnH4FkHuArGz791j9sZjsTymMXsS_6ndTl2eeetc7bIBUws2jOUqZullsp4B8-9pw_5uo-pNV2cNpSRIg9pgjnSyBV57Cfx5jGmKrBRHdosEgtHOQq2RHqW4iNskE8yebpKNU9Vcdet6cWhP0Mf7i0DyoZV_FivYl17Y1AhzGr5DxopUoKFC93I_BleMbhwZpoXzbQNOqQGW9xkh6_TJyVQ0Y437c2GXiRZxLUByTJtVPEFU4qW2sOk4GW1pHZIqryrpUBu_jyOsQXWomLPnaFte2vgHNJL2CIzeiZq4i3kcsveCtvcSCJiiBt-IljVeenhcZxo%3D) Anthony Brindisi has sold out our district to Governor Cuomo’s and Nancy Pelosi’s liberal agendas. He’s a voice for higher taxes, a stronger China, and socialized healthcare in Washington, and that’s the last voice we need in Congress at a time like this!
We just kicked off our marathon to the general election – and with our end of quarter fundraising deadline coming up on **June 30th at 11:59pm,** we have a chance to prove to the rest of the country that NY-22 will be a part of flipping the House and taking back Congress in 2020.
**Will you help me get rid of Anthony Brindisi so we can take back Congress this year?** [**HELP ME MAKE UPSTATE NEW YORK GREAT AGAIN**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=9ecd79e7cbae4af8ae6031f619806d38&_e=1Pj52fVdwp3Shuncy_l1sfD-SoPtatNc8HuoCdBFr2bIMBMK6_GZ2PyDGQwfV8EduJLgbHjvj3agXr7wdAShN4ihuKiBKWfjzyFDxlRkFlHr_15qY6WKa7w5c_qfPeRBNXB1rhbyOQDfi1AXAR7xrclN2jpGiOvTlpV5OnH4FkHuArGz791j9sZjsTymMXsS_6ndTl2eeetc7bIBUws2jOUqZullsp4B8-9pw_5uo-pNV2cNpSRIg9pgjnSyBV57Cfx5jGmKrBRHdosEgtHOQgKx7JjHnupkg_kbgZ6xerMKmv9mkzTS-uqYq7IaqwgOBmb8R9Klu5HZlMTlJn4UzQt2xD1n0E46ipurHB-zjJjcaRH45oRCSo_T8cZypEL2SQV2aJULxsmm1FyDuh4Nl_pA9oYi-Nuy2CQ5_WuBNPSnG6lDb0-J2NEpTxj1fVnIAHjj7scTgFyRnRp86uRbaaEUNovftEFnlQ0xupxvG-Q%3D) Upstate New York needs this, Congress needs this, and America needs this. Join me and let’s make it happen together.
Thank you, Claudia Tenney |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: On the road to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Jake is the candidate we need. | | | |
---
| | | Traveling the district is the best part of campaigning because it allows us to meet people where they are and understand what issues make a difference in their lives. It is our goal to make it to as many places as possible, and [**with 39 days left until the August 4th primary election, we need your help keeping gas in the tank**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f9478d808e&e=1050d051da).

[Will you help us with a donation to the campaign that allows us to keep up the pace?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e64307c2ce&e=1050d051da)
---
| [$100 = 3 tanks of gas!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bad2e9fc0e&e=1050d051da "$100 = 3 tanks of gas!")
---
|
---
---
|
---
| From factory to farm, Kansans are committed to working hard and taking care of business, even if that means doing things a bit differently than they have in the past.

We are so proud to be from Kansas and are determined to send a representative to Congress who knows our state, understands what we need, and will fight for our values. Jake LaTurner has a solid track record of fighting for conservative principles and getting things done for Kansas.
---
| [$50 = 20 yard signs](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=09fd0be1b8&e=1050d051da "$50 = 20 yard signs")
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Jake is the candidate we need to keep our well funded Democrat opponent from turning this seat blue. We have what it takes to win and are gaining momentum each and every day. [Any support you can send our way helps us put up more yard signs, more tv ads, and more miles on the road.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=381e1620dd&e=1050d051da)

name: Finance Team (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: We're still being outraised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Good news and bad news for our team today -- I'll start with the good. We're making amazing progress toward our $50,000 end-of-quarter online fundraising goal.

Now the bad news: That grassroots energy hasn't overtaken Garcia's corporate PACs and special interest money. We're still being outraised, and we need to close the gap.

**[We only need to raise $31,288 more to hit our end-of-quarter goal. Can you chip in $5 or more right now to help close out this quarter in a strong position?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba42/29776869/9d72e6a/569edb7a/2801985690/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNS1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq5-s1")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba42/29776869/9d72e6a/569edb7b/2801985690/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNS1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq5-s1&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba42/29776869/9d72e6a/569edb74/2801985690/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNS1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq5-s1&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba42/29776869/9d72e6a/569edb77/2801985690/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNS1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq5-s1&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba42/29776869/9d72e6a/569edb7a/2801985690/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNS1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq5-s1")
There's only a little left to go before we hit our goal, which means that every donation makes a huge amount of impact.

**[So if you can, please chip in to help meet our goal. Our average grassroots donation this month is $21 -- but whatever you can, every little bit counts.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba42/29776869/9d72e6a/569edb7a/2801985690/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNS1zMSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq5-s1")**

I'm so proud to be part of a campaign that's generated such incredible grassroots enthusiasm. I hope you are, too.

subject: One thing is clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639fd/2198303937/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter:

After nearly two decades in Washington, one thing is clear -- you can trust Senator John Cornyn to side with the pharmaceutical companies and the insurance industry over his constituents.

I will always side with Texans. **That 's why I'm running against Sen. Cornyn.** In the Senate, I'll protect our health care and fight for a public option so EVERYONE can get the health care they need.

**Will you join me in this fight for our health care by contributing today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639f3/2198303937/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639f2/2198303937/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639f0/2198303937/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639f6/2198303937/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639f4/2198303937/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__")**
**While Senator Cornyn spends a lot of time _talking_ about wanting to reduce the cost of prescription drugs, his _actions_ paint a completely different picture.** He took hundreds of thousands of dollars from Big Pharma and then voted against a bipartisan bill that would have lowered the cost of prescription drugs, but could have hurt his donors' profits.
Senator Cornyn has worked hand-in-hand with Mitch McConnell to:
1. Gut protections for _millions_ of Texans with pre-existing conditions
2. Allow insurance companies to charge older Texans _more_ for coverage

---
**[If you think it's time that Texans have a senator who will defend their health care and work to improve it (not tear it down), donate to my campaign today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639ea/2198303937/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=10")**

Senator Cornyn is just another politician in the pockets of corporate PACs. He's forgotten who he was elected to serve: the people of Texas.

I know Texans aren't afraid to fight for what we believe in. I don't believe in backing down from tough fights -- but I need you on this one, Peter.

**[Join my team today by making a quick donation. Help me defend our health care.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639ea/2198303937/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=10")**

Thanks,
MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639ea/2198303937/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200625.3nd__1598__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639e8/2198303937/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1598&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890196/7f51f7bc/41517ed2/4ef639ee/2198303937/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: John Lewis
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068b/55b66746/21056c0e/80ee938/576808705/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Friends, We are experiencing profound national crises on multiple fronts. From the protests demanding an end to racial oppression and dramatic changes to our policing system, to an economic recession and more, _Joe Kennedy offers our country the powerful moral leadership we need to get through this._ [**So I 'm personally asking: Will you join me in supporting Joe with a small $3 or $10 donation to send him to the Senate before his critical End-of-Quarter deadline in 4 days? **](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewis-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL-&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250") I have fought for civil rights my entire life, and while we have made significant progress, we have miles to go before we sleep. This fight will not end with my generation. Joe has marched. Joe has spoken out. Joe has amplified the voices of Black and brown Americans. Joe has walked side-by-side with me across the Edmund Pettus Bridge. Joe has led. He understands what's at stake, _**and you can take it from me, he will get the job done.**_ **Right now, Joe is up against his biggest test yet: his final End-of-Quarter FEC deadline before the primary.[Will you chip in $3 or $10 before June 30th so Joe has the resources he needs to win on September 1st? ](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewis-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL-&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")** In the years that I have known Joe Kennedy I have seen him stand up and fight -- time and again -- for the suffering, the struggling, and the silenced. That's the leadership we need in the Senate. Leadership that won't just accept a return to "normal," but will push us to build a new, better "normal" where healing and justice are delivered to every single person that calls this country home. Joe is a clear voice for justice and dignity in a rising class of public servants -- _and I know he will be a tremendous partner in the Senate to help finally achieve justice for all._ **So what do you say, everyone? [Will you join me in helping to elect Joe Kennedy to the United States Senate? Again, he's facing an important deadline on June 30th, so if you can, please rush a donation to help Joe win. ](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewis-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL-&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")** Joe was built for this fight. Let's send him to the frontlines. clean_body: | "" | | Friends, We are experiencing profound national crises on multiple fronts. From the protests demanding an end to racial oppression and dramatic changes to our policing system, to an economic recession and more, Joe Kennedy offers our country the powerful moral leadership we need to get through this. "" I have fought for civil rights my entire life, and while we have made significant progress, we have miles to go before we sleep. This fight will not end with my generation. Joe has marched. Joe has spoken out. Joe has amplified the voices of Black and brown Americans. Joe has walked side-by-side with me across the Edmund Pettus Bridge. Joe has led. He understands what's at stake, and you can take it from me, he will get the job done. Right now, Joe is up against his biggest test yet: his final End-of-Quarter FEC deadline before the primary. "" In the years that I have known Joe Kennedy I have seen him stand up and fight -- time and again -- for the suffering, the struggling, and the silenced. That's the leadership we need in the Senate. Leadership that won't just accept a return to "normal," but will push us to build a new, better "normal" where healing and justice are delivered to every single person that calls this country home. Joe is a clear voice for justice and dignity in a rising class of public servants -- and I know he will be a tremendous partner in the Senate to help finally achieve justice for all. So what do you say, everyone? "" Joe was built for this fight. Let's send him to the frontlines. Yours in solidarity, John Lewis "" | ---|---|--- | | "" "" ""

body:
Peter,Today, Bill Hagerty released his latest editorial in _The Federalist _calling for an end to the chaos brought on by radical anarchists, who are vandalizing and destroying statues and memorials across the country.Democrat mayors have joined these radicals in support of removing these statues in clear testimony that the mob now rules their streets. They want to erase history and in doing so, eliminate the opportunity to learn from the past - good and bad. We can't allow the mob to control our country. We need to re-elect President Donald Trump and put an end to the radical liberals' march toward socialism.[**READ THE OP-ED**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-j/)** | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptikjld-fuutjhhtj-u/)
